title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd!
